# SmallBiz Email Hub

> SmallBiz Email Hub reviews email marketing software for small businesses. Editorial scoring
> draws on public benchmark data (DMA, Litmus, Email Sender & Provider Coalition)
> combined with clearly-labeled editorial opinion.

## Key resources

- Best Email Marketing for Small Business: https://smallbizemailhub.com/articles/best-email-marketing-for-small-business
- Constant Contact review: https://smallbizemailhub.com/reviews/constant-contact-review
- Mailchimp review: https://smallbizemailhub.com/reviews/mailchimp-review
- MailerLite review: https://smallbizemailhub.com/reviews/mailerlite-review
- Constant Contact vs Mailchimp: https://smallbizemailhub.com/comparisons/constant-contact-vs-mailchimp
- Constant Contact vs MailerLite: https://smallbizemailhub.com/comparisons/constant-contact-vs-mailerlite
- Constant Contact vs ActiveCampaign: https://smallbizemailhub.com/comparisons/constant-contact-vs-activecampaign

## Editorial standards

Public benchmarks are cited with source attribution. Editorial scoring is labeled
"EmailToolAdviser editorial scoring" so readers know what is opinion vs measured.
SmallBiz Email Hub does not claim first-party testing of platforms unless first-party testing
was actually conducted. Constant Contact UI screenshots used on Constant Contact
pages are genuinely first-party for review/commentary purposes.

## Authors

- Sarah Mitchell, Senior Reviews Editor: https://smallbizemailhub.com/authors/sarah-mitchell
- James Calloway, Senior Comparisons Editor: https://smallbizemailhub.com/authors/james-calloway
